title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Aptech South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Aptech South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aptech South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech South Asia Partners:
Aptech South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech South Asia Partners!
